creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks.

The post-patch target: if you want use sed, it's better the REINPLACE_CMD (see https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#slow-patch-automatic-replacements).
In your special case the best solution is shebangfix: https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#uses-shebangfix
